description: A professor is teaching multiple sections of the same course and wants to merge them into a single LMS shell to simplify content management.

nodes.task_description: Identify the faculty member and the course sections to be merged.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the professor teaches sections 001, 002, and 003 of 'HIST101'.

nodes.task_description: Explain the implications of merging, such as how the gradebook will appear.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the features of a merged course shell.

nodes.task_description: Process the course merge request in the LMS admin tools.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully merges the sections into a single LMS course.
